system.description:
When you **_stare into the sun long enough to lose your vision_**, name a person or place that you know and roll +WIS: **on a 10+**, you briefly glimpse your subject as if from a great height, and choose 2 from the list below; **_on a 7-9_**, you briefly glimpse your subject as if from a great height, and choose 1.

- The glimpse lasts as long as you wish
- Your point of view shifts to very close range
- You recover your vision quickly

success.value: You briefly glimpse your subject from a great height — choose 2.

partial.value: You briefly glimpse your subject from a great height — choose 1.
